card.name: World Breacher
card.text: Once during each of your turns, you may cast a historic spell you own from outside the game. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.)

card.name: Urza's Chronicle
card.text: Search your library for a card, exile it face down, then shuffle. You may cast it without paying its mana cost if its mana value is 4 or less. Put it into your hand if it wasn't cast this way.

card.name: Gamelen, Citanul Elder
card.text: As Gamelen, Citanul Elder enters the battlefield, choose a nonland permanent type. Spells you cast of the chosen type cost {G} (or {1}) less to cast. {T}: Add {G} for each permanent you control of the chosen type.

card.name: Radiant, Mad Regent
card.text: Flying Whenever a player attacks you, that player sacrifices a black creature of their choice. Whenever Radiant, Mad Regent becomes tapped, put a paranoia counter on target creature an opponent controls. It becomes a 2/2 black Phyrexian in addition to its other types and colors.

card.name: Urza, Heartless Savior
card.text: [+2]: Untap up to two lands. [-4]: Each player may put a nonlegendary permanent card from their hand onto the battlefield. [-9]: Each opponent chooses four permanents they control and sacrifices the rest. Add {C} for each permanent sacrificed this way.

card.name: Memory Burner
card.text: {T}, Exile Memory Burner: Each player exiles all cards from their hand face down and draws that many cards. At the beginning of the next end step, each player discards their hand and returns to their hand each card they exiled this way.

card.name: Genomic Blueprint
card.text: As Genomic Blueprint enters the battlefield, choose a nonland card name. Triggered abilities of sources with the chosen name don't trigger.

card.name: The Realmstone
card.text: When The Realmstone is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, exile target nonland permanent.

card.name: Gauntlet of Oppression
card.text: At the beginning of each player's upkeep, if Gauntlet of Oppression is untapped, that player may pay {2}. If they don't, they return a permanent they control to its owner's hand.

card.name: Gilded Lotus
card.text: {T}: Add three mana of any one color.

card.name: Cursed Heirloom
card.text: Whenever you cast a historic spell, draw a card. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.) At the beginning of your end step, discard your hand.

card.name: Broken Relic
card.text: Broken Relic enters the battlefield with three charge counters on it. {2}, {T}, Remove a charge counter from Broken Relic: Copy target activated or triggered ability you control. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Urza's Chibouk
card.text: Recollection {3} (If you cast this for its recollection cost, after your next draw step, sacrifice it unless you pay {3}.) {T}: Draw a card.

card.name: Drowned Wood
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {G} or {U}. Activate only if you control an Island.

card.name: Wanderer il-Vec
card.text: When Wanderer il-Vec dies, create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token.

card.name: Arizon Refugee
card.text: Lifelink {W}, Sacrifice Arizon Refugee: Destroy target artifact or enchantment. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Thran Remnant
card.text: Whenever you cast a historic spell, put a +1/+1 counter on Thran Remnant. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.)

card.name: The Sleepers Awaken
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II, III — Create a 1/1 black Phyrexian creature token. ​ ​

card.name: Radiant's Chosen
card.text: Radiant's Chosen has flying as long as you've gained life this turn.

card.name: Auramancer
card.text: When Auramancer enters the battlefield, you may return target enchantment card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Guardian of the Realm
card.text: Flying When Guardian of the Realm enters the battlefield, put a +1/+1 counter on target historic creature you control. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.)

card.name: Thran Enforcer
card.text: Thran Enforcer costs {1} less to cast for each artifact you control. Vigilance

card.name: Null Sphere Sentinel
card.text: Whenever another historic permanent enters the battlefield under your control, tap target creature an opponent controls. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.)

card.name: Wistful Remembrancer
card.text: Flying Wistful Remembrancer has lifelink as long as you control a historic permanent. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.)

card.name: Isel, Master Carver
card.text: When Isel, Master Carver enters the battlefield, return up to two target artifact cards from your graveyard to your hand. Farcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the other into your graveyard.)

card.name: Divine Arrow
card.text: Divine Arrow deals 4 damage to target attacking or blocking creature.

card.name: Borrowed Time
card.text: When Borrowed Time enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until Borrowed Time leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Citanul Blade
card.text: Flash When Citanul Blade enters the battlefield, attach it to target creature you control. That creature gains first strike until end of turn. Equipped creature gets +1/+0. Equip {3}

card.name: Moment of Crisis
card.text: Moment of Crisis costs {2} less to cast if it targets a historic permanent. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.) Destroy target nonland permanent.

card.name: Waking Dream
card.text: Each player exiles all enchantment cards from their graveyard, then sacrifices all enchantments they control, then puts all cards they exiled this way onto the battlefield.

card.name: Invasion of Tolaria
card.text: (As this enters, choose an opponent to protect it. You can attack it.) When Invasion of Tolaria enters the battlefield or is defeated, choose up to two target nonland permanents controlled by the same opponent. That player puts one permanent on top of their library and the other on the bottom.

card.name: The Fall of Serra
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Destroy all creatures. II — Return target artifact or creature card from your graveyard to your hand. III — Create a 4/4 white Angel creature token with flying and vigilance.

card.name: Radiant Angel
card.text: Recollection {1}{W}{W} (If you cast this for its recollection cost, after your next draw step, sacrifice it unless you pay {1}{W}{W}.) Flying, vigilance

card.name: Write into History
card.text: Whenever a nonlegendary creature you control dies, create a token that's a copy of it, except it's legendary and enters the battlefield with an additional +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Obsessive Rector
card.text: When Obsessive Rector dies, you may exile it. If you do, search your library for a historic card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.)

card.name: Ghitu Mirrorblade
card.text: Whenever equipped creature attacks, put a mirage counter on Ghitu Mirrorblade, then for each mirage counter on it, create a token that's a copy of equipped creature, except it's 1/1, isn't legendary, and is tapped and attacking. Equip {3}

card.name: Rewrite
card.text: As an additional cost to cast Rewrite, sacrifice an enchantment. Search your library for an enchantment card with mana value X or less, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Day of Destiny
card.text: Legendary creatures you control get +2/+2.

card.name: Keldon Warweaver
card.text: Recollection {1}{W} (If you cast this for its recollection cost, after your next draw step, sacrifice it unless you pay {1}{W}.) When Keldon Warweaver enters the battlefield, creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Hallowed Embalmer
card.text: When Hallowed Embalmer enters the battlefield, return target creature card with mana value 1 or 2 from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Thran Goliath
card.text: Whenever an enchantment enters the battlefield under your control, put a +1/+1 counter on Thran Goliath. If this is the second time this ability has resolved this turn, Thran Goliath gains flying, first strike, and trample until end of turn.

card.name: Storied Automaton
card.text: Double strike Whenever another permanent you control leaves the battlefield, if it had counters on it, put a +1/+1 counter on Storied Automaton.

card.name: Capashen Scion
card.text: Whenever you sacrifice a nontoken permanent, create a tapped 1/1 white Soldier creature token.

card.name: Rayne, Tolaria's Steward
card.text: Whenever you cast a historic spell, draw a card. If Rayne, Tolaria's Steward is enchanted, instead draw two cards. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.)

card.name: Blinding Seraph
card.text: Flying Whenever Blinding Seraph enters the battlefield or attacks, tap target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: Radiant's Shieldmaid
card.text: Sacrifice Radiant's Shieldmaid: Target creature gains hexproof and shielded until end of turn. (Prevent all damage that would be dealt to it.)

card.name: Serra's Oracle
card.text: When Serra's Oracle enters the battlefield, look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal a historic card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.)

card.name: Sanctum Keeper
card.text: Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on Sanctum Keeper. Sanctum Keeper has flying as long as there are two or more counters on it.

card.name: Temporal Prison
card.text: Exile target noncreature artifact or noncreature enchantment. Farcycling {3} ({3}, Discard this card: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the other into your graveyard.)

card.name: Burnished Heirloom
card.text: Whenever you attack, put a +1/+1 counter on target attacking creature. {1}{W}, Sacrifice Burnished Heirloom: Put a +1/+1 counter on target attacking creature.

card.name: Song of All
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II — Create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token. III — Create a 4/4 white Angel creature token with flying and vigilance. ​

card.name: Relic Runner
card.text: Relic Runner can't be blocked if you've cast a historic spell this turn. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.)

card.name: Tolarian Visionary
card.text: When Tolarian Visionary enters the battlefield, draw a card.

card.name: Effigy of Grief
card.text: When Effigy of Grief enters the battlefield, draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Soaring Digestor
card.text: Flying Whenever another artifact enters the battlefield under your control, you may draw a card. If you do, discard a card.

card.name: Kukemssa Raider
card.text: When Kukemssa Raider enters the battlefield, draw a card. Then discard a card unless you control a historic permanent. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.)

card.name: Thran Cocoon
card.text: When Thran Cocoon enters the battlefield, you may sacrifice an artifact. When you do, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature and draw a card.

card.name: Omen, Dramatic Pretender
card.text: When Omen, Dramatic Pretender enters the battlefield, tap target creature an opponent controls and put two stun counters on it. Farcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the other into your graveyard.)

card.name: Tolarian Humpback
card.text: Tolarian Humpback costs {1} less to cast for each historic permanent you control. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.) {2}{U}, Tap an untapped artifact you control: Tolarian Humpback can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Temporal Pause
card.text: Target creature gains hexproof and shielded until end of turn. (Prevent all damage that would be dealt to it.)

card.name: Stoic Rebuttal
card.text: Stoic Rebuttal costs {1} less to cast if you control three or more artifacts. Counter target spell.

card.name: Essence Dispersal
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}. Farcycling {1}{U} ({1}{U}, Discard this card: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the other into your graveyard.)

card.name: Applied Psychophysics
card.text: Applied Psychophysics costs {1} less to cast as long as you've discarded a card this turn. Draw two cards.

card.name: Remnant of the Past
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature loses all abilities and is a legendary 1/1 artifact creature named Vestige of History.

card.name: Aether Migration
card.text: Target creature's owner puts it on their choice of the top or bottom of their library. Farcycling {1}{U} ({1}{U}, Discard this card: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the other into your graveyard.)

card.name: Gathan Incubator
card.text: When Gathan Incubator enters the battlefield or is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, draw a card. {2}{U}, Sacrifice Gathan Incubator: Create a tapped 2/2 blue Metathran creature token.

card.name: Tolarian Chronomancer
card.text: Vigilance {U}, {T}: Copy target triggered ability you control twice. You may choose new targets for the copies.

card.name: Temporal Crisis
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II — Skip your next turn. III — Take an extra turn after this one. ​

card.name: Eon Spiral
card.text: Each player shuffles their hand and graveyard into their library, then draws cards equal to the greatest number of cards a player shuffled into their library this way. Exile Eon Spiral.

card.name: Tolarian Gatekeeper
card.text: Flying, vigilance When Tolarian Gatekeeper enters the battlefield, if it was cast, return each other nonland permanent that's not historic to its owner's hand.

card.name: Chronoshriek
card.text: Each opponent mills cards equal to the number of cards in their graveyard. Farcycling {1}{U} ({1}{U}, Discard this card: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the other into your graveyard.)

card.name: Vodalian Sifter
card.text: Prowess Each instant and sorcery card in your hand has farcycling {3}. ({3}, Discard that card: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the other into your graveyard.)

card.name: Flight of the Palinchron
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Untap up to four lands. II — Return target non-Saga permanent to its owner's hand. III — Create a 4/5 blue Illusion creature token with flying.

card.name: Paax, Vat Priest
card.text: Artifact creatures you control get +1/+1. When Paax, Vat Priest enters the battlefield, you may have target noncreature artifact become a 0/0 Phyrexian creature. If you do, put three +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Shiftling
card.text: {U}: Shiftling gains prowess until end of turn. (Multiple instances of prowess trigger separately.) {U}: Shiftling phases out. (Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until its controller's next turn.) {1}: Shiftling gets +1/-1 or -1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Paradoxysm
card.text: Flash Flying When Paradoxysm enters the battlefield, exile target instant or sorcery card with a cycling ability from your graveyard. You may cast it this turn. (You still pay its costs.)

card.name: Primordial Transmutation
card.text: Until end of turn, target artifact or creature becomes a Serpent artifact creature with base power and toughness 4/4 in addition to its other types. Farcycling {2}{U} ({2}{U}, Discard this card: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the other into your graveyard.)

card.name: Shadow Chaser
card.text: Recollection {1}{U} (If you cast this for its recollection cost, after your next draw step, sacrifice it unless you pay {1}{U}.) When Shadow Chaser enters the battlefield, return target creature an opponent controls to its owner's hand.

card.name: Jarsyl, Obsessive Searcher
card.text: When Jarsyl, Obsessive Searcher enters the battlefield, look at the top three cards of your library. You may reveal a historic card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.) {7}: Exile Jarsyl and target nonland permanent.

card.name: Clay Sentinel
card.text: Recollection {2}{U} (If you cast this for its recollection cost, after your next draw step, sacrifice it unless you pay {2}{U}.) When Clay Sentinel enters the battlefield, look at the top three cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard.

card.name: Diligent Sculptor
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Historic creatures you control have prowess. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.)

card.name: Prismatic Filter
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. You may spend mana as though it were mana of any type to cast historic spells. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.)

card.name: Thirst for the Past
card.text: Draw three cards. Then discard two cards unless you discard a historic card. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.)

card.name: Theoretical Device
card.text: Whenever a historic permanent enters the battlefield under your control, target player mills four cards. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.) {2}, Sacrifice Theoretical Device: Draw a card.

card.name: Aether Orrery
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, you may put a charge counter on Aether Orrery. {T}: You may put an artifact card with mana value equal to the number of charge counters on Aether Orrery from your hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: The Founding of Tolaria
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II, III, IV — Mill three cards. You may put a historic card from among them into your hand. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.) Historic spells you cast this turn cost {2} less to cast. ​

card.name: Careful Plan
card.text: Draw a card, then discard a card. Untap a land you control.

card.name: Temerity
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has flying. When Temerity is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, draw a card.

card.name: Psychoplasm
card.text: Recollection {1}{B} (If you cast this for its recollection cost, after your next draw step, sacrifice it unless you pay {1}{B}.) When Psychoplasm enters the battlefield, each opponent discards a card.

card.name: Acolyte of All Things
card.text: Lifelink

card.name: Nether Ghast
card.text: When Nether Ghast enters the battlefield, return target creature card with recollection from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Vhelnish Ghoul
card.text: Menace Whenever you discard a card, Vhelnish Ghoul gets +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Urborg Bruiser
card.text: Whenever you sacrifice a permanent, Urborg Bruiser gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Neurothrax
card.text: Flying Whenever you discard a card, Neurothrax gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Necrophage
card.text: Whenever you gain life, each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: Gorig, Thorn Within
card.text: When Gorig, Thorn Within enters the battlefield, it deals 2 damage to any target and you gain 2 life. Farcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the other into your graveyard.)

card.name: Frightmare
card.text: Frightmare costs {1} less to cast for each historic card in your graveyard. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.) Farcycling {1}{B} ({1}{B}, Discard this card: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the other into your graveyard.)

card.name: Mortal Blow
card.text: Target creature gets +2/-2 until end of turn.

card.name: Return to Action
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature gets +1/+0 and gains lifelink and "When this creature dies, return it to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control.

card.name: Nasty End
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Draw two cards. If the sacrificed creature was legendary, draw three cards instead.

card.name: Duress
card.text: Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a noncreature, nonland card from it. That player discards that card.

card.name: Utter Desolation
card.text: Exile target creature or planeswalker. Farcycling {1}{B} ({1}{B}, Discard this card: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the other into your graveyard.)

card.name: From Void Evolved Phyrexia
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Each player sacrifices a nonland permanent of their choice. II — Each player loses 3 life. III — You may pay any amount of life. When you do, draw that many cards.

card.name: Cursed Talisman
card.text: Each other nonland permanent you control is a Saga enchantment in addition to its other types and has "r{3} — You draw two cards and you lose 2 life." (They're sacrificed when their last chapter ability resolves.)

card.name: Academy Desecrator
card.text: Menace, trample Whenever you put a lore counter on a Saga you control, each other creature gets -1/-1 until end of turn. Whenever the final chapter ability of a Saga you control triggers, you draw a card and you lose 1 life.

card.name: Bone Engineer
card.text: Whenever a nontoken creature you control dies, you lose 1 life and you create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.") {T}, Sacrifice an artifact: Draw a card.

card.name: Negator's Embrace
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+2 and has "Whenever this creature is dealt damage, sacrifice that many permanents."

card.name: Croag, Rath's Eminence
card.text: Whenever Croag, Rath's Eminence enters the battlefield or attacks, you may sacrifice a nonartifact, nonland permanent. When you do, each opponent sacrifices a permanent of their choice of the same type. {1}{B}, Pay 1 life: Create a tapped 1/1 black Phyrexian creature token.

card.name: Scent of Pomegranate
card.text: Reveal any number of black cards in your hand. Each creature gets -X/-X until end of turn, where X is the number of cards revealed this way. If a creature an opponent controls would die this turn, exile it instead.

card.name: Thoughtseize
card.text: Target player reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card. You lose 2 life.

card.name: Stronghold Engineer
card.text: Whenever you discard a card, you may pay 1 life. If you do, create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Funereal Imp
card.text: Flying Whenever a creature you control dies, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Death Defier
card.text: {3}{B}, Sacrifice Death Defier: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Greel, the Mindflayer
card.text: Whenever you discard one or more cards, target creature an opponent controls gets -X/-X until end of turn, where X is the number of cards you discarded.

card.name: Phyrexian Denigrator
card.text: Creatures have base toughness 1.

card.name: Spliced Hybrid
card.text: Deathtouch, lifelink {1}, Sacrifice Spliced Hybrid: Distribute a deathtouch counter and a lifelink counter among creatures you control. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Tattered Colos
card.text: Recollection—{B}, Pay 1 life (If you cast this for its recollection cost, after your next draw step, sacrifice it unless you pay {B} and pay 1 life.) You may cast Tattered Colos from your graveyard for its recollection cost.

card.name: Inner Turmoil
card.text: Enchant permanent When enchanted permanent is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, you draw three cards and you lose 3 life.

card.name: Withering Torment
card.text: Destroy target creature or enchantment. You lose 2 life.

card.name: Vicious Reprisal
card.text: Destroy target creature if its total power and toughness are 4 or less, or if you've sacrificed a creature this turn.

card.name: Plague of Koilos
card.text: All creatures get -1/-1 until end of turn. If you've discarded a card this turn, all creatures get -2/-2 until end of turn instead.

card.name: Fall to Ignominy
card.text: Destroy target creature if it isn't historic. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.) Farcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the other into your graveyard.)

card.name: Scrapwork Skitterer
card.text: Haste Discard a card, Sacrifice Scrapwork Skitterer: Draw a card.

card.name: Latulla's Chosen
card.text: Recollection {1}{R} (If you cast this for its recollection cost, after your next draw step, sacrifice it unless you pay {1}{R}.) Menace

card.name: Mycothrax
card.text: Recollection {1}{RG} (If you cast this for its recollection cost, after your next draw step, sacrifice it unless you pay {1}{RG}.)

card.name: Furnace Ticks
card.text: {1}, Sacrifice Furnace Ticks: Exile target artifact. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Grudge Elemental
card.text: Recollection {1}{R} (If you cast this for its recollection cost, after your next draw step, sacrifice it unless you pay {1}{R}.) When Grudge Elemental dies, it deals 2 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Firefright Summoner
card.text: Recollection {1}{R} (If you cast this for its recollection cost, after your next draw step, sacrifice it unless you pay {1}{R}.) When Firefright Summoner enters the battlefield, target creature an opponent controls can't block this turn.

card.name: Fiery Corpse
card.text: Trample, haste

card.name: Salvaged Su-Chi
card.text: Recollection {2}{R} (If you cast this for its recollection cost, after your next draw step, sacrifice it unless you pay {2}{R}.) Reach

card.name: Mg'razzgh, Scourge of Shiv
card.text: Flying {2}{R}: Mg'razzgh, Scourge of Shiv gets +2/+0 until end of turn. Farcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the other into your graveyard.)

card.name: Shock
card.text: Shock deals 2 damage to any target.

card.name: Timeless Fury
card.text: Target creature gets +X/+0 and gains trample until end of turn, where X is 1 plus the number of cards named Timeless Fury in your graveyard. A deck can have any number of cards named Timeless Fury.

card.name: Urgent Preparation
card.text: As an additional cost to cast Urgent Preparation, discard a card. Draw two cards.

card.name: Mana Decay
card.text: Choose one — • Mana Decay deals 3 damage to target creature. If that creature would die this turn, exile it instead. • Exile target artifact.

card.name: Liquidate
card.text: Players can't gain life this turn. Damage can't be prevented this turn. Liquidate deals 4 damage to any target.

card.name: Shivan Firestorm
card.text: Shivan Firestorm costs {1} less to cast for each artifact you control. Shivan Firestorm deals 6 damage to target creature, planeswalker, or battle.

card.name: Burning Confidant
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, exile the top card of your library. When you do, Burning Confidant deals damage to you equal to that card's mana value. You may play that card this turn.

card.name: Burnished Pteropterix
card.text: Flying, trample Whenever Burnished Pteropterix attacks, it gets +1/+0 until end of turn for each artifact you control. Then if its power is 6 or greater, it gains double strike until end of turn.

card.name: Cataclysm of Twelve Worlds
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Cataclysm of Twelve Worlds deals 4 damage to each creature, planeswalker, and battle. II — Sacrifice a land. III — Each opponent sacrifices two lands of their choice.

card.name: Barded Hellkite
card.text: Flying When Barded Hellkite enters the battlefield, create two Treasure tokens. (They're artifacts with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.") At the beginning of the end step, sacrifice Barded Hellkite if you control no artifacts.

card.name: Mana Rig Crew
card.text: Double strike Whenever an artifact enters the battlefield under your control, Mana Rig Crew deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: Stalker Engine
card.text: Menace Whenever Stalker Engine deals combat damage to a player, you may have that player gain control of it. If you do, create four tapped Treasure tokens. (They're artifacts with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Recreate the Past
card.text: Create a token that's a copy of target historic permanent you control, except it isn't legendary and has haste. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the end step. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.)

card.name: Acridian Queen
card.text: Recollection {2}{R} (If you cast this for its recollection cost, after your next draw step, sacrifice it unless you pay {2}{R}.) When Acridian Queen enters the battlefield or dies, it deals 2 damage to any target.

card.name: Ferocious Sandstalker
card.text: Haste Whenever a historic permanent enters the battlefield under your control, creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain haste until end of turn. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.)

card.name: Havoc Djinn
card.text: Protection from artifacts (This creature can't be blocked, targeted, dealt damage, or equipped by artifacts.)

card.name: Shivan Skytyrant
card.text: Flying Shivan Skytyrant has haste as long as you've sacrificed a permanent this turn.

card.name: Kreig, Butchered Witch-King
card.text: Haste Whenever you sacrifice a permanent, put a +1/+1 counter on Kreig, Butchered Witch-King.

card.name: Deimosaur
card.text: Deimosaur costs {1} less to cast for each historic permanent you control. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.) Farcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the other into your graveyard.)

card.name: Avalanche Shepherd
card.text: Recollection {2}{R} (If you cast this for its recollection cost, after your next draw step, sacrifice it unless you pay {2}{R}.) When Avalanche Shepherd enters the battlefield, destroy target land. Its controller may search their library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped with a stun counter on it, then shuffle.

card.name: Rig Scavenger
card.text: When Rig Scavenger enters the battlefield, create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.") Rig Scavenger gets +1/+0 for each artifact you control.

card.name: Engineered Potential
card.text: As Engineered Potential enters the battlefield and at the beginning of your upkeep, you may have it become a copy of another artifact or creature you control until end of turn, except it has haste and is still an artifact.

card.name: Geoclasm
card.text: Geoclasm deals 4 damage to target creature, planeswalker, or battle.

card.name: Furnace Celebration
card.text: Whenever you sacrifice another permanent, you may pay {2}. If you do, Furnace Celebration deals 2 damage to any target.

card.name: Disastrous Impact
card.text: Choose one — • Exile target artifact. • Disastrous Impact deals 3 damage to target creature. If that creature would die this turn, exile it instead.

card.name: Magma Torrent
card.text: Magma Torrent deals 2 damage to each creature. Farcycling {1}{R} ({1}{R}, Discard this card: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the other into your graveyard.)

card.name: The Time of Dark
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II — Gain control of target creature until end of turn. Untap that creature. It gains haste until end of turn. III — Whenever a creature you control attacks this turn, it gets +1/+0 until end of turn. ​

card.name: Yavimaya Remembrancer
card.text: When Yavimaya Remembrancer enters the battlefield, choose one — • Remove a lore counter from target Saga you control. (Removing lore counters doesn't cause chapter abilities to trigger.) • Put a lore counter on target Saga you control.

card.name: Citanul Outcast
card.text: When Citanul Outcast enters the battlefield or dies, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Argothian Wayfinder
card.text: Recollection {G} (If you cast this for its recollection cost, after your next draw step, sacrifice it unless you pay {G}.) {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Molimo Guards Yavimaya
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II — Create a 3/3 green Beast creature token. III — Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. ​

card.name: Rofellos, Llanowar Rover
card.text: Vigilance {T}: Add {G} for each basic land you control.

card.name: Citanul Remembrancer
card.text: When Citanul Remembrancer enters the battlefield, return target historic card from your graveyard to your hand. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.)

card.name: Toxic Hellbender
card.text: Reach, deathtouch {1}{G}: Toxic Hellbender vets +2/+2 until end of turn. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Primal Granger
card.text: Recollection {1}{G}{G} (If you cast this for its recollection cost, after your next draw step, sacrifice it unless you pay {1}{G}{G}.) When Primal Granger enters the battlefield, you may search your library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Liefellen, Quirion Exarch
card.text: Liefellen, Quirion Exarch enters the battlefield with a number of +1/+1 counters on it equal to the number of lands you control. Farcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the other into your graveyard.)

card.name: Magnigoth Council
card.text: Magnigoth Council costs {1} less to cast for each historic permanent you control. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.) Trample

card.name: Tempting Dryad
card.text: Reach When Tempting Dryad enters the battlefield, another target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control.

card.name: Ancient Animus
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control if it's legendary. Then it fights target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: Llanowar Draught
card.text: Flash When Llanowar Draught enters the battlefield, target creature you control gets +2/+2 until end of turn. {4}, {T}, Sacrifice Llanowar Draught: Draw a card.

card.name: What Remains of Argoth
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II — You may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield. III — Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) ​

card.name: Argothian Revel
card.text: Reveal the top four cards of your library. You may put a historic card and/or a land card from among them into your hand. Put the rest into your graveyard. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.)

card.name: Carnage Tyrant
card.text: Carnage Tyrant can't be countered. Trample, hexproof

card.name: Exerter of Will
card.text: When Exerter of Will enters the battlefield, if it entered from a graveyard or was cast from a graveyard, until end of turn, you may play lands and cast spells from your graveyard. If a card would be put into your graveyard from anywhere this turn, exile that card instead.

card.name: Argothian Colossus
card.text: Argothian Colossus costs {2} less to cast for each historic permanent you control. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.) Trample Argothian Colossus enters the battlefield with X +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Song of Gaea
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Search your library for a creature card with mana value X or less, exile it, then shuffle. II — You may put the exiled card onto the battlefield. III — Put a +1/+1 counter on a creature you control.

card.name: Gift of Titania
card.text: Create a token that's a copy of target creature you control, except it's not legendary and has base power and toughness 7/7.

card.name: History Uncovered
card.text: Return target card from your graveyard to your hand. Distribute X +1/+1 counters among creatures you control, where X is that card's mana value. Exile History Uncovered.

card.name: Emperor Megasuchus
card.text: Recollection {2}{G}{G} (If you cast this for its recollection cost, after your next draw step, sacrifice it unless you pay {2}{G}{G}.) At the beginning of your end step, put X +1/+1 counters on target creature you control, where X is Emperor Megasuchus's power.

card.name: Elven Eulogist
card.text: When Elven Eulogist enters the battlefield, you may search your library for an enchantment card, put it into your graveyard, then shuffle. {G}, {T}, Sacrifice an enchantment: Return target enchantment card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Scripture Incisor
card.text: Deathtouch Whenever you put a lore counter on a Saga you control, target opponent gets a poison counter. (A player with ten or more poison counters loses the game.)

card.name: Quagthrak
card.text: Recollection {1}{G} (If you cast this for its recollection cost, after your next draw step, sacrifice it unless you pay {1}{G}.) Whenever a creature you control dies, you may search your library for a basic land card, put it into the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Titania's Burlwing
card.text: Vigilance, reach, trample

card.name: Summerbloom Hydra
card.text: Trample Whenever an enchantment enters the battlefield under your control, put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two target creatures.

card.name: Rampaging Hive
card.text: Recollection {2}{G} (If you cast this for its recollection cost, after your next draw step, sacrifice it unless you pay {2}{G}.) When Rampaging Hive enters the battlefield or dies, put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control.

card.name: Pharyngion
card.text: Flash Pharyngion's power and toughness are each equal to the number of creature cards in your graveyard.

card.name: Scroll of Beginnings
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Put three +1/+1 counters on target artifact or land you control. It becomes a 0/0 Elemental creature in addition to its other types. II — Surveil 1. III — Target creature you control gets +1/+1 until end of turn for each card in your graveyard.

card.name: Audacity
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+0 and has trample. When Audacity is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, draw a card.

card.name: Jolrael's Devotee
card.text: Recollection {1}{G} (If you cast this for its recollection cost, after your next draw step, sacrifice it unless you pay {1}{G}.) Reach

card.name: Oak-Bark Memories
card.text: Target creature gets +X/+X and gains trample until end of turn, where X is the greatest mana value among permanents you control.

card.name: Blossoming Defense
card.text: Target creature you control gets +2/+2 and gains hexproof until end of turn. (It can't be the target of spells or abilities your opponents control.)

card.name: Citanul Ritual
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II — Destroy target noncreature permanent. III — Add {G}{G}. Until end of turn, you don't lose mana as steps or phases end. ​

card.name: Thorn Goliath
card.text: You may have Thorn Goliath assign its combat damage as though it weren't blocked.

card.name: Cradle of Learning
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II — Create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.") III — Add X mana of any one color, where X is the number of historic permanents you control. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.) ​

card.name: Ready for War
card.text: As an additional cost to cast Ready for War, sacrifice an artifact or enchantment. Return target artifact or enchantment card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Processor Colossus
card.text: Processor Colossus enters the battlefield tapped with a stun counter on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.) Whenever Processor Colossus becomes tapped, put a stun counter on it. Processor Colossus can't be blocked except by three or more creatures.

card.name: Nightmare Void
card.text: Whenever you discard a card, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: Slumbering Tyrant
card.text: Recollection {2}{R}{G} (If you cast this for its recollection cost, after your next draw step, sacrifice it unless you pay {2}{R}{G}.) Flying When Slumbering Tyrant enters the battlefield or attacks, creatures you control get +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Pristine Grove
card.text: Each enchantment you control has ward {2}. (Whenever it becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) {1}, Sacrifice Pristine Grove: Search your library for an enchantment card, reveal it, then shuffle and put that card on top.

card.name: Imperial Assassin
card.text: Vigilance, lifelink {1}{W}{B}, {T}: Destroy target creature if its power is less than or equal to the amount of life you've gained this turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Fossil Merchant
card.text: When Fossil Merchant enters the battlefield, create X Treasure tokens, where X is the number of nontoken artifacts you control. (They're artifacts with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Thran Skimmer
card.text: Flying When Thran Skimmer enters the battlefield, you gain 2 life and draw two cards. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Relic of Tawnos
card.text: Each basic land card in your hand has farcycling {U}{B}. Farcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the other into your graveyard.)

card.name: Tormented Sleeper
card.text: Recollection {1}{BR} (If you cast this for its recollection cost, after your next draw step, sacrifice it unless you pay {1}{BR}.) When Tormented Sleeper enters the battlefield, create a 1/1 black Phyrexian creature token. That token gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Gaea's Weaver
card.text: Recollection {1}{R}{G} (If you cast this for its recollection cost, after your next draw step, sacrifice it unless you pay {1}{R}{G}.) Menace When Gaea's Weaver enters the battlefield, create two 2/1 green Kavu creature tokens.

card.name: Gaea's Last Gift
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II — Create a 2/1 green Kavu creature token. III — Return target creature or enchantment card from your graveyard to your hand. ​

card.name: Argothian Excavation
card.text: Reveal the top five cards of your library. You may put a card from among them into your hand. Put the rest into your graveyard.

card.name: Savage Dreamer
card.text: When Savage Dreamer enters the battlefield, if you control a historic permanent, draw a card. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.) Savage Dreamer has flying as long as you control a historic permanent.

card.name: Bitter Untouchable
card.text: When Bitter Untouchable enters the battlefield, create a tapped artifact token named Powerstone Shard with "{T}: Add {C} for each artifact you control named Powerstone Shard."

card.name: Mana Lance
card.text: As an additional cost to cast Mana Lance, sacrifice a nonland permanent. Exile target nonland permanent.

card.name: Metathran Tactician
card.text: When Metathran Tactician enters the battlefield, return target artifact card from your graveyard to your hand. Whenever a historic permanent enters the battlefield under your control, put a +1/+1 counter on Metathran Tactician. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.)

card.name: Blind Devourer
card.text: Flying Whenever you discard a card, put a +1/+1 counter on Blind Devourer.

card.name: Drudge Regent
card.text: Whenever another creature you control dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Drudge Regent. Then if you sacrificed that creature, Drudge Regent gains menace and deathtouch until end of turn.

card.name: Llanowar Warden
card.text: Recollection costs you pay cost {1} less. (This applies to both halves of the cost.)

card.name: Argothian Remnant
card.text: Trample Whenever Argothian Remnant attacks, you may remove a lore counter from each of any number of Sagas you control. Put a +1/+1 counter on Argothian Remnant for each lore counter removed this way.

card.name: Radiant's Torment
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Create two 1/1 black Phyrexian creature tokens. II — Distribute a deathtouch counter and a lifelink counter among creatures you control. III — Whenever a creature dies this turn, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Ilsa Braven, Stoic Captain
card.text: Ilsa Braven, Stoic Captain's power and toughness are each equal to the number of permanent cards in your graveyard. Farcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the other into your graveyard.)

card.name: Grafted Breacher
card.text: Flying Grafted Breacher's power and toughness are each equal to the number of artifacts you control.

card.name: Gatha, Eugenic Renegade
card.text: Menace Whenever you sacrifice a nontoken permanent, you may pay {2}. If you do, create a 2/2 blue Metathran creature token.

card.name: Silver Precursor
card.text: Flying When Silver Precursor enters the battlefield, surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Fallaji Remnant
card.text: Recollection {3} (If you cast this for its recollection cost, after your next draw step, sacrifice it unless you pay {3}.) When Fallaji Remnant enters the battlefield, draw a card.

card.name: Stasis Cage
card.text: When Stasis Cage enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until Stasis Cage leaves the battlefield. Farcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the other into your graveyard.)

card.name: Xantcha's Heart
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast a historic spell. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.) {2}, {T}: Add two mana in any combination of colors.

card.name: Conversion Vat
card.text: When Conversion Vat enters the battlefield, draw a card. {T}, Tap an untapped artifact or creature you control: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Koilos Effigy
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast a historic spell or activate an ability of a historic source. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.)

card.name: Thran Simulacrum
card.text: Recollection {3} (If you cast this for its recollection cost, after your next draw step, sacrifice it unless you pay {3}.) When Thran Simulacrum enters the battlefield or dies, search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Quicksilver Metamorph
card.text: You may have Quicksilver Metamorph enters the battlefield as a copy of an artifact or creature you control. Farcycling {3} ({3}, Discard this card: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the other into your graveyard.)

card.name: Urza's Automaton
card.text: Urza's Automaton gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control.

card.name: Slumbering Dynamo
card.text: {T}: Exile target card from a graveyard. As long there are three or more cards exiled with it, Slumbering Dynamo is a 3/3 Construct artifact creature.

card.name: Worn Powerstone
card.text: Worn Powerstone enters the battlefield tapped. {T}: Add {C}{C}.

card.name: Volatile Workshop
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {5}: Volatile Workshop becomes a 3/3 Assembly-Worker artifact creature with vigilance until end of turn. It's still a land. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each historic permanent you control. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.)

card.name: Feral Masticore
card.text: When Feral Masticore enters the battlefield, discard a card. Whenever you discard a card, Feral Masticore deals 1 damage to any target. {4}: Draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Karn, Legacy's Steward
card.text: Other artifacts you control have indestructible. Karn, Legacy's Steward can't attack unless defending player controls no creatures. {7}: Put a silver counter on target creature. It becomes an artifact. (It's no longer a creature.)

card.name: Karn, Legacy's Steward
card.text: Other artifacts you control have indestructible. Karn, Legacy's Steward can't attack unless defending player controls no creatures. {7}: Put a silver counter on target creature. It becomes an artifact. (It's no longer a creature.)

card.name: URZ Draft Archetypes URZ
card.text: {W}{U} HISTORIC ARTIFACTS History is tangible. Rely on the relics of the past. {U}{B} DISCARD Farcycle your way to success, picking your key cards out along the way. {B}{R} SACRIFICE Sagas and recollection spells will help reward you for your sacrifices. {R}{G} RECOLLECTION Build your manabase for large spells, or split their cost across time. {G}{W} HISTORIC SAGAS Write history anew as you rely on the power of Sagas for your historic effects. {W}{B} LIFEGAIN Serra's boons and Phyrexian drain effects alike will help your life total. {B}{G} GRAVEYARD Your Sagas, recollected spells, or farcycled cards will help you from beyond the grave. {G}{U} HISTORIC Artifacts, Sagas, and legends alike contribute to Dominaria's history. {U}{R} ARTIFACTS Artifacts are history, but also very much the future. {R}{W} SACRIFICE Victory has a price, and Phyrexia will not be defeated without casualties.

card.name: Bloodline Project
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Create a 2/2 blue Metathran creature token. II, III — Target creature you control gets +1/+1 until end of turn. If you control another historic permanent, put a +1/+1 counter on it instead. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.) ​

card.name: Glacian's Sickness
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II, III — Create a tapped artifact token named Powerstone Shard with "{T}: Add {C} for each artifact you control named Powerstone Shard." Target creature you don't control gets -X/-X until end of turn, where X is the number of artifacts you control. ​

card.name: Yotian Mine
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. If you control an Urza's Power-Plant and an Urza's Tower, instead create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Yotian Power-Plant
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. If you control an Urza's Mine and an Urza's Tower, instead create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Yotian Tower
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. If you control an Urza's Mine and an Urza's Power-Plant, instead create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Tawnos Enters the Coffin
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II, III — Exile up to one target creature until Tawnos Enters the Coffin leaves the battlefield. Destroy all nonland permanents. ​

card.name: Assault on the Spheres
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II, III — All creatures get -1/-1 until end of turn. Destroy target artifact, creature, or planeswalker an opponent controls. ​

card.name: Glacian's Sickness
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II — Create a tapped artifact token named Powerstone Shard with "{T}: Add {C}: For each artifact you control named Powerstone Shard." III — Target creature you don't control gets -X/-X until end of turn, where X is the number of artifacts you control.

card.name: Bloodline Project
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II — Distribute two +1/+1 counters among creatures you control. III — Create an X/X blue Metathran creature token, where X is the greatest power among creatures you control.

card.name: Radiant's Opus
card.text: Flying Radiant's Opus enters the battlefield with a +1/+1 counter on it if you control another historic permanent. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.)

card.name: Powerstone Shard URZ
card.text: {T}: Add {C} for each artifact you control named Powerstone Shard.

card.name: Gathering the Legacy
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II — Search your library for an artifact card, exile it, then shuffle. III — Put an artifact card exiled with Gathering the Legacy onto the battlefield under your control. ​

card.name: Rugged Isle
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {U} or {R}. Activate only if you control a Mountain.

card.name: Overgrown Mire
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {B} or {G}. Activate only if you control a Forest.

card.name: Tainted Field
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {W} or {B}. Activate only if you control a Swamp.

card.name: Sweeping Peak
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {R} or {W}. Activate only if you control a Plains.

card.name: Phyrexian Denouncement
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Create two 1/1 black Phyrexian creature tokens. II, III — You may sacrifice a creature. When you do, target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn. ​

card.name: Treasure URZ
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Thran Mine
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {3}, {T}, Sacrifice Thran Mine: Return target historic card from your graveyard to your hand. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.)

card.name: Temporal Window
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {3}, {T}: Draw a card. Then discard a card unless you exile a historic card from your graveyard (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.)

card.name: Winds of Ascension
card.text: Destroy all nonland permanents your opponents control. Your life total becomes equal to your starting life total.

card.name: Plains
card.text: {T}: Add {W}.

card.name: Island
card.text: {T}: Add {U}.

card.name: Swamp
card.text: {T}: Add {B}.

card.name: Mountain
card.text: {T}: Add {R}.

card.text: {T}: Add {G}.

card.name: Scorn of the Untouchables
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II — Destroy target creature or planeswalker. III — Exile target card from a graveyard. Each opponent loses 1 life. ​

card.name: Into the Tolarian Vale
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II — Create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.") III — Create a Black Lotus token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice Black Lotus: Add three mana of any one color.") ​

card.name: Black Lotus URZ
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice Black Lotus: Add three mana of any one color.

card.name: Trine, Fallen Angel
card.text: Flying Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on Trine, Fallen Angel.

card.name: Angel URZ
card.text: Flying, vigilance

card.name: Gix, Hand of Phthisis
card.text: Menace, deathtouch Whenever Gix, Hand of Phthisis attacks, you may sacrifice another creature. When you do, return target artifact or creature from your graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter on it.

card.name: Bridge to Infinity
card.text: Whenever you sacrifice a permanent with mana value 3 or greater, draw a card.

card.name: Yavimaya Amulet
Heart of Shiv
card.text: Heart of Shiv enters the battlefield tapped. {T}: Add {B} or {R}. Farcycling {B}{R} ({B}{R}, Discard this card: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the other into your graveyard.)

card.name: Fluctuating Portal
card.text: When Fluctuating Portal enters the battlefield, return target card with a cycling ability from your graveyard to your hand. The first cycling ability you activate each turn costs {1} less to activate.

card.name: Argothian Ridge
card.text: Argothian Ridge enters the battlefield tapped. {T}: Add {R} or {G}. Farcycling {R}{G} ({R}{G}, Discard this card: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the other into your graveyard.)

card.name: Tolarian Coast
card.text: Tolarian Coast enters the battlefield tapped. {T}: Add {W} or {U}. Farcycling {W}{U} ({W}{U}, Discard this card: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the other into your graveyard.)

card.name: Sewers of Terisia
card.text: Sewers of Terisia enters the battlefield tapped. {T}: Add {U} or {B}. Farcycling {U}{B} ({U}{B}, Discard this card: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the other into your graveyard.)

card.name: Argivian Expanse
card.text: Argivian Expanse enters the battlefield tapped. {T}: Add {G} or {W}. Farcycling {G}{W} ({G}{W}, Discard this card: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the other into your graveyard.)

card.name: From Void Evolved Phyrexia
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Each player sacrifices a nonland permanent of their choice. II — Each player loses 3 life. III — You may pay any amount of life. When you do, draw that many cards.

card.name: From Void Evolved Phyrexia
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Each player sacrifices a nonland permanent of their choice. II — Each player loses 3 life. III — You may pay any amount of life. When you do, draw that many cards.

card.name: Plague Rock
card.text: When Plague Rock enters the battlefield, create two 1/1 black Phyrexian creature tokens. {1}{B}, Sacrifice a creature: Target creature gets -1/-1 until end of turn. {1}{G}, Sacrifice a creature: You may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: Illusion URZ
card.text: Flying
